name: Instagram Add Link
description: Opens Instagram, navigates to Edit Profile, and adds a single external link with a title.

params.title: The display title for the link

steps.goal: Open Instagram. If you see any popup or dialog (like 'Not now', 'Skip', account suggestions, or a Google sign-in prompt), dismiss it by tapping 'Not now', 'Skip', 'X', or pressing Back. Navigate to your own profile by tapping the profile icon in the bottom-right corner of the screen. Once on your profile page (you should see 'Edit profile' button), tap 'Edit profile'. Wait for the Edit Profile screen to load.

You are on the Edit Profile screen. Find and tap the 'Links' section or 'Add link' button. Then tap 'Add external link'. You should see a form with URL and Title fields. Tap the URL field and type: '{{url}}'. Then tap the Title field and type: '{{title}}'. Verify both fields are filled correctly. Then tap the checkmark or 'Done' button (top-right) to save the link. If Instagram shows any dialog or popup after saving, dismiss it. If you return to the Edit Profile or Links page showing your new link, mark done.

Verify the link was added. Navigate back to your profile page (press Back or tap the profile icon in the bottom-right). Check that the profile shows a link section with '{{title}}' or '{{url}}' visible. If the link appears on the profile, mark done. If no link is visible, mark as failed.
